case_title: JAMES LEE STEPHENS VS. JUDITH GUERRIERO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND REPORT THE CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF JAMES LEE STEPHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUDITH GUERRIERO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
